title: VR+
description: A simple client-side modpack that is meant to enhance the VR minecraft experience.
body:
# VR+

This is pretty simple modpack that adds **performance mods**, **QOL mods**, and audiovisual **immersion mods** to make the VR experience a bit nicer. All mods are configured to work well in VR.

## QOL Features

- Minimap (Journeymap)

- Player heads in chat (ChatHeads)
  
- Advanced Item tooltips (Inspecio)
  
- Better hunger bar (AppleSkin)
  
- Crashes don't exit the game (Not Enough Crashes)
  
- Simple F3 menu (BetterF3)
  
- Better HUD for Mounts (Better Mount HUD)
  
- Discord rich presence (CraftPresence)
  
- Item sorting and autoswitching (Inventory Profiles Next)
  
- More balanced music selection
  

## Immersion Features

- Audio physics (Sound Physics Remastered)
  
- Better footstep sounds (Presence Footsteps)
  
- ambient noises (AmbientSounds)
  
- Mob ragdolls (Phsics Mod)
  
- Eating animations for food items (Eating Animation)
  
- 3D Skins (3D Skin Layers)

- New particle effects (Visuality)

## KNOWN ISSUES

- overlapping menu buttons
